prompt: People keep asking for my reading recommendations. Turn my private list into a curated feed that others can subscribe to.
Build a Bluesky client module that shows my timeline, lets me post, and handles notifications.
I make cooking videos. Build a module where I upload videos and stream them to subscribers.
I'm reading a web serial and want a local tracker for my progress with notifications when new chapters drop.
I'm a web fiction author. Build me a publishing module where I write chapters, schedule releases, and distribute them to paying subscribers.
Take my latest chapter and generate an audiobook version using my preferred voice.
Distribute the new audiobook chapter to my paid subscribers and notify them when it is ready.
Connect my WhatsApp messages to my node so I can read and reply without opening the phone app.
I use Telegram for my hobby group and WhatsApp for family. Show both in one inbox but keep the two streams visually separated.
I want one compose view that can post the same update to Bluesky, Telegram, and X.
If messages arrive while I am in a focus session, hold them and show me a summary when the session ends.
Create a minimal offline-first email triage client with message list, detail view, reply composer, and a local send queue.
Build a local-first peer-to-peer messenger that works over the LAN without internet or centralized servers.
Create an email archive module that stores messages locally, supports full-text search, threading, templates, and export.
Build a system tray mail watcher that monitors multiple IMAP inboxes and shows unread counts with native notifications.
Create a local voice-note recorder with microphone selection, start/stop controls, and simple save or attach actions.
Build a lightweight local-first IRC client with channel list, message timeline, compose input, and connection controls.
Create an onboarding walkthrough that teaches users how to use an email client through highlighted steps and tooltips.
Build a local announcement reader that turns queued text sources into spoken audio with scheduling and source priority.
Create a subtitle and timed-text track editor for local video files with preview and export.
Generate a static local-first artist profile hub with biography, timeline, discography, gallery, and a simple contact handoff.
Build a mailing-list manager for a small self-publishing operation that tracks contacts, shipments, labels, and follow-ups.
Create a local business-card and contact capture tool for storing, searching, and exporting professional contacts.
